logs.message: WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Port 'out_breath' with mode 'ap_none' may require an associated data valid signal to correctly communicate with other blocks or a test bench; automatic C/RTL co-simulation may not be able to verify such a port.

WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Port 'in_breath' with mode 'ap_none' may require an associated data valid signal to correctly communicate with other blocks or a test bench; automatic C/RTL co-simulation may not be able to verify such a port.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Design contains AXI ports. Reset is fixed to synchronous and active low.

WARNING: [BIND 205-102] The specified resource core for memory 'row_buf_V_1' will be ignored if a simpler one can be used.

WARNING: [HLS 200-1450] Process unpack has both a successor and writes an output to its caller (see the GUI dataflow viewer). This may lead to lower throughput. Consider copying this output via a successor process. Resolution: For help on HLS 200-1450 see www.xilinx.com/cgi-bin/docs/rdoc?v=2022.2;t=hls+guidance;d=200-1450.html

WARNING: [HLS 200-960] Cannot flatten loop 'VITIS_LOOP_134_8' (accelerator_v2.cpp:134:32) in function 'pad' the outer loop is not a perfect loop because there is nontrivial logic in the loop latch. WARNING: [Simtcl 6-197] One or more HDL objects could not be logged because of object type or size limitations. add_wave /apatb_accelerator_v2_top/CTRL_AWVALID -into $tb_return_group -color #ffff00 -radix hex ## add_wave /apatb_accelerator_v2_top/CTRL_AWADDR -into $tb_return_group -radix hex ## set tbcinputgroup [add_wave_group "C Inputs" -into $testbenchgroup] ## set tb_return_group [add_wave_group return(axis) -into $tbcinputgroup] ## add_wave /apatb_accelerator_v2_top/in_stream_TREADY -into $tb_return_group -color #ffff00 -radix hex ## add_wave /apatb_accelerator_v2_top/in_stream_TVALID -into $tb_return_group -color #ffff00 -radix hex ## add_wave /apatb_accelerator_v2_top/in_stream_TDEST -into $tb_return_group -radix hex ## add_wave /apatb_accelerator_v2_top/in_stream_TID -into $tb_return_group -radix hex ## add_wave /apatb_accelerator_v2_top/in_stream_TLAST -into $tb_return_group -color #ffff00 -radix hex ## add_wave /apatb_accelerator_v2_top/in_stream_TUSER -into $tb_return_group -radix hex ## add_wave /apatb_accelerator_v2_top/in_stream_TSTRB -into $tb_return_group -radix hex ## add_wave /apatb_accelerator_v2_top/in_stream_TKEEP -into $tb_return_group -radix hex ## add_wave /apatb_accelerator_v2_top/in_stream_TDATA -into $tb_return_group -radix hex ## save_wave_config accelerator_v2.wcfg ## run all //////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// // Inter-Transaction Progress: Completed Transaction / Total Transaction // Intra-Transaction Progress: Measured Latency / Latency Estimation * 100% // // RTL Simulation : "Inter-Transaction Progress" ["Intra-Transaction Progress"] @ "Simulation Time" //////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// // RTL Simulation : 0 / 1 [0.00%] @ "125000" // RTL Simulation : 1 / 1 [100.00%] @ "9253685000" //////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// $finish called at time : 9253745 ns : File "/misc/scratch/gwl459/augmented-reality-glasses/fpga_software/PL/accelerator_v2/solution1/sim/verilog/accelerator_v2.autotb.v" Line 552 run: Time (s): cpu = 00:13:10 ; elapsed = 00:13:30 . Memory (MB): peak = 5587.480 ; gain = 0.000 ; free physical = 228064 ; free virtual = 360747 ## quit
